retrieved_result: Cherokee National Holiday "Arts and crafts booths on the Cherokee Heritage Center grounds, Cherokee National Holiday, 2007The Cherokee National Holiday is an annual event held each Labor Day weekend in Tahlequah, Oklahoma.
